title: Retired Architect-side ev4-builder-context-package Schema Identity
description: No Architect payload may validate under ev4-builder-context-package@1.0.0. That schema id is reserved for Builder runtime intake in EV4-Builder-Assistant-Repo. Historical Architect exports must migrate to ev4-architect-legacy-builder-context-export@1.0.0 or to the authoritative ev4-architect-output-contract@1.0.0 CE intake source.
